case_title: CDX BUILDERS, INC. VS. CRYSTAL NICOLE THOMAS, INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSI et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-06-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S) OR FILE DISMISSAL FOLLOWING TERMINATION OF DEFENDANT'S BANKRUPTCY. THE JUL-29-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
